steps.assistant_text: gl_func_00074DB4: bigger sibling of the 74D54 interrupt-bracket setter. sr bracket (s1); P1->f_18 = arg; *P2 |= 2; v = P1->p_8->w_20 & 0xFFF (s0); P1->w_20 = (u32)(P1->f_18 * (float)(u32)v) & 0xFFF. The 30-insn FCSR save/set/cvt.w.s/check/retry/restore block is IDO's INLINE (u32)float cast emit -- one C cast, zero hand-waving; the lui 0x4F800000 add is the (float)(u32) correction. Register declaration order (v before sr) sets the s0/s1 assignment. Same-BB CSE shares one global load across the two statements.

metadata.verification: Byte-exact 74/74 words standalone AND in-tree vs baserom; report.json fuzzy=100.0; carve boundaries + TEXT_END byte-verified.
